svg.text: Each node is a self-sovereign system. No central authority. No external dependency. Complete operational independence.
Action → Validate → Filter (RoutePolicy) → Plan (RIB) → Commit → Notify (Peers/GW/Envoy)
Pure state machine — zero side effects
V2: No external routes — local + internal only
UpdateMsg: { updates: [{ action, route, nodePath, originNode }] }
